title: Scaffold repo and model runtime adapter
problem: The repo contained only documentation. Implementation needs a runnable Phase 0 / 0.5 skeleton: Python package, CLI stubs, config loading, SQLite schema placeholder, a formal LLM adapter boundary with deterministic mock mode, domain pack stubs, fixtures, golden scaffold tests, and a static public-site placeholder.
evidence: docs/agents/02_ARCHITECTURE.md section 11: Phase 0 scope and exit criteria.
docs/agents/03_MODEL_RUNTIME_SPEC.md section 14: Phase 0 / pre-scaffold ticket definition.
docs/agents/04_CURSOR_BUILD_LOOP.md sections 6 and 8: model runtime adapter as the first implementation ticket.
acceptance_criteria: rge package imports and the editable install succeeds.
research --help / run --help / export-public --help / verify --help work without Ollama, DB, or network.
rge/llm/registry.py selects mock for RGE_LLM_MODE=mock, ollama for ollama, and fails closed otherwise with no silent fallback.
Mock client returns deterministic, schema-versioned fixture outputs.
Ollama client is a configured local adapter boundary with no live inference requirement in this ticket.
rge/db/schema.sql exists and names the 16 expected scaffold tables.
Creativity domain pack stub YAML files exist; no creativity fields in core code.
Fixture directories and sample fixtures exist.
Public site builds statically from JSON with no write/ingestion/agent routes.
Agent report exists in agent_reports/ and ticket queue is updated honestly.
test_plan: cd apps/public-site && npm install && npm run build
non_goals: Do not implement Phase 1 ingestion, chunking, claim extraction, or validation.
Do not implement live Ollama inference or bundle model weights.
Do not implement public export logic or publishing.
Do not add public write/ingestion/agent routes.
Do not add model-controlled shell or Git access.
rollback_plan: Delete or abandon branch phase-0/ticket-001-repo-scaffold-model-runtime (or revert its merge commit). No database, no public deployment, and no external state is touched; docs and ticket queue revert with the branch.
